rationale: The 2013 paper is cited only in grouped literature citations, mainly as an example that choice can depend on choice-set context and attribute tradeoffs. The citing paper does not discuss its specific prominence-versus-dominance mechanism, does not derive hypotheses directly from it, and does not reuse its design or measures. The core theory and empirical tests in the citing paper are built around expectation disconfirmation from common attributes, so this reference functions as broad background positioning rather than a distinct building block.
